programme.desc: It’s a hilarious shock to the cabbies when Rev. Jim brings his new pet to the garage—an over-the-hill racehorse that he bought after cashing in on the 300-to-1 long shot. However, he soon finds that it’s impossible to housebreak a horse.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby faces a humorous predicament when it becomes obvious that one of the biggest talent managers in New York is representing him because of his prowess as a lover, and not for his ability as an actor.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a protest against unsafe equipment, the cabbies go on strike, and Louie offers an unusual solution to the problem to shop steward Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a hilarious caper, Louie and the cabbies pool all their cash to buy a painting at an auction, planning to cash in big when the artist dies—but when the bidding gets too heavy, the gang turns a dignified auction into a frolicking free-for-all.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: A small town is thrown into turmoil when the townsfolk think the local pay phone is a direct line to God

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: A hard-boiled journalist with a grudge against God harasses the angels while they’re searching for a boy who sent god a message in a bottle

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica and Tess go Hollywood to help the daughter of an old-time movie star come to terms with long-kept family secrets, on Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: MONICA HELPS THE TOWN OUTCAST WHO IS ACCUSED OF HAVING MURDERED HER HUSBAND 35 YEARS EARLIER

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: On Christmas eve, Monica comforts a developmentally disabled boy who blames himself for his brother’s disappearance in a blizzard
programme.sub-title: It Came Upon a Midnight Clear

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: When a woman murders her sister’s physically abusive husband, the siblings must confront the abuse they suffered as children at their father’s hand

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: When a drug-addicted mother and her baby disappear from the hospital, Monica and Tess must track them down before they both die

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: A baker in a small town is called upon by God to be a prophet and face-off against satan

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: A military base commander’s obsession with heroics puts the lives of his two sons in jeopardy

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: A young boy hides from life behind his dictionary until a tragic accident forces him to re-enter the real world

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: When Monica injures her head and forgets who she is, she helps a hopeless doctor remember his own identity

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The angels must unearth a 30-year-old secret that destroyed a celebrated comedy team in time for the comedians to reunite for the last time

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: A slumlord is sentenced to live in his own decrepit building -- and hopefully regain the faith he lost one Passover many years earlier

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica, Tess, and Andrew counsel the self-destructive, vengeful survivor of Joe Greene’s reckless driving accident

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Nathaniel is kidnapped by the self-destructive, vengeful survivor of Joe Greene’s reckless driving accident

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica and Andrew are sent to find a mysterious man posing as the angel of death in a hospital ward for the terminally ill
programme.sub-title: Miles To Go Before I Sleep

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica must prevent a brilliant young politician from sacrificing her promising career because of a destructive friendship

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica defies a powerful corporation when it threatens to destroy a small town

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: In a flashback to 1865, Monica and Andrew meet Abraham Lincoln and John Wilkes Booth on the day of the president’s assassination

programme.title: Sanctuary: Sanctuary For All Pt 1
programme.desc: The enigmatic Dr. Helen Magnus recruits an insightful forensic psychiatrist Will Zimmerman (ROBIN DUNNE) to join her in the quest to track, study and protect the strange, and often terrifying creatures that secretly populate our world. Part 1.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Sanctuary For All Pt 2
programme.desc: The enigmatic Dr. Helen Magnus recruits an insightful forensic psychiatrist Will Zimmerman (ROBIN DUNNE) to join her in the quest to track, study and protect the strange, and often terrifying creatures that secretly populate our world. Part 2.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Fata Morgana
programme.desc: Dr. Helen Magnus, her daughter Ashley, and new to the Sanctuary, Dr. Will Zimmerman release three women from a mysterious crypt in Scotland, bringing them back to the Sanctuary for refuge.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Folding Man
programme.desc: An investigation into a string of bizarre robberies leads Magnus and Will to a crime ring of thieves who seem to be able to slip between the cracks of the law…literally.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Kush
programme.desc: Returning with an abnormal captured in the Himalayas, Magnus and Will are stranded from civilization and aid after their plane goes down in a desolate mountain range.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Nubbins
programme.desc: When a mating pair of cute, furry and seemingly harmless abnormals is brought in for scientific study, the Sanctuary team begins to exhibit some hidden animal attractions for one another.

programme.title: The Ray Bradbury Theater
programme.desc: A nurse accompanies a "dying" ghost on a train ride across Europe to Great Britain, in search of a place of refuge where people still believe in the supernatural.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: A mutant empath on the run from mysterious government agents is rescued by a team of fellow "New Mutants," the group known as Mutant X.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Brennan is captured and falls under Eckhart's control, and he is forced to work against the New Mutants.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Mutant X comes to the aid of a teenager New Mutant pursued by Russians because she holds the secret to a new weapon that targets mutants.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Shalimar becomes close to another feral when it's "lust at first sight," but matters become complicated when her new boyfriend tries to find a cure for his condition.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: A New Mutant is kidnapped from his family, and Mutant X sets out to recover him and find out what Eckhart's interest in him is.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: When a plague that only affects mutants is raging, Adam and Eckhart agree to work together to find a cure.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Eckhart seeks a mutant who can absorb energy, one who Brennan becomes romantically involved with.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Jesse falls in love with a computer hacker, who Eckhart wants to "procure" in order to corrupt the public computer news channels against New Mutants...and to the GSA's benefit.
programme.sub-title: In the Presence of Mine Enemies

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: A boy who's developing new mutant abilities has been kidnapped and the team agrees to find him for his mother. They later learn she was the one who had her son kidnapped.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The team encounters some people trying to break into a Genomex lab and discover that they're ferals.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: A New Mutant with the power of invisibility is working against both Eckhart and Adam, despite the fact she was involved with Adam in the past.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: An old friend of Brennan's lures him and Emma into a trap. Emma ends up split into two separate entities, one good and one evil.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Jesse is roped into a deadly undercover mission by his estranged father, who is working against Eckhart.

programme.title: Matlock: The Personal Trainer
programme.desc: Ben Matlock discovers the private life of a personal trainer includes sizzling secrets that might shatter the reputations of several socialites. Harry Slade puts Casanova to shame, but it costs him his life.

programme.title: Matlock: The Narc
programme.desc: Ben Matlock exposes skimming and corruption when he defends undercover narcotics officer Johnny Bauer against murder charges.

programme.title: Matlock: The Secret (Part 1)
programme.desc: Matlock’s client, a hot blues singer and compulsive gambler, is accused of murdering his boss/bookmaker, but Matlock discovers that a lot of people wanted the victim dead.

programme.title: Matlock: The Secret (Part 2)
programme.desc: Defending a compulsive gambler accused of killing his bookie, Matlock uncovers an unsolved I5-year-old art theft and murder, as well as a blackmail scheme that followed the crime.

programme.title: Matlock: The Brothers
programme.desc: Ben Matlock has a hunch his client, Dr. Lowell Carr, could be guilty of murdering his partner and framing a patient for the crime.

programme.title: Matlock: The Cover Girl
programme.desc: Three high fashion cover girls are suspects in the death of a powerful agent who was stabbed to death in a famous photographer’s darkroom. Ben Matlock takes the case at the insistence of his investigator, Conrad McMasters.

programme.title: Matlock: The Biker
programme.desc: Ben Matlock inherits a major problem when he agrees to defend Cliff Lockwood, an anti-social biker with an attitude the size of downtown Detroit.

programme.title: Matlock: The Broker
programme.desc: D.A. Julie March refuses to back away from a closed case in which her prime murder suspect commits suicide and, after his death, allegedly disposes of a missing murder weapon.

programme.title: Matlock: The Fighter
programme.desc: Ben Matlock finds no shortage of shady characters when scandal and murder rocks the training camp of boxer Billy Leon just before the biggest match of his career.

programme.title: Matlock: The Critic
programme.desc: Matlock reluctantly becomes an angel for a Broadway-bound musical about lawyers when the playwright Sam Spelvin is accused of murdering an acerbic theater critic.

programme.title: Matlock: The Parents
programme.desc: Ben Matlock has an unusual problem defending a young married couple accused of murdering the woman who gave birth to a baby they were prepared to adopt.

programme.title: Matlock: The Man Of The Year
programme.desc: It’s good news/bad news for Ben Matlock on the day he will be honored as Atlanta’s Man of the Year.

programme.title: Matlock: The Arsonist
programme.desc: An arsonist is about to torch Matlock’s favorite men’s store and one of the owners will become Matlock’s next case after his partner is murdered.

programme.title: Matlock: The Formula
programme.desc: Misplaced loyalties make Jonathan Duvall the prime suspect for robbery and murder when he attempts to right alleged wrongs against his mentor.

programme.title: Matlock: The Trial (Part 1)
programme.desc: When an Assistant District Attorney is murdered, Matlock is asked to switch sides and act as Special Prosecutor for the state of Georgia.

programme.title: Matlock: The Trial (Part 2)
programme.desc: Matlock’s investigation as the state’s Special Prosecutor uncovers a judicial conspiracy involving two judges and a corporate lawyer.

programme.title: Matlock: The Accident
programme.desc: Matlock’s client is accused of killing his ambulance-chasing lawyer who specializes in cases of personal injury – especially when the injuries occur at a local amusement park.

programme.title: Matlock: The Celebrity
programme.desc: Ben Matlock flies out to Hollywood to defend a beautiful former actress, Catherine Welden, who formed a lucrative cosmetic business only to be accused of murdering an ex-lover who was blackmailing her.

programme.title: Matlock: The Witness Killings (Part 1)
programme.desc: When Matlock returns to his hometown, he ends up defending an accused murderer and becoming the town’s worst enemy.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Two planes collide in mid-air and crash into a Los Angeles suburb. There are more than 80 victims. The accident set in motion many changes, notably the way planes are monitored.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: A military 737 carrying high-powered passengers crashes miles from its intended destination in Croatia. Was the accident an act of terrorism against the United States or were other factors to blame?

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: A plane crashes into the Red Sea minutes after take off. Was it terrorism? A mechanical failure? Or did the very experienced and respected pilot make a mistake that cost all on board their lives?

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: A plane mysteriously circles the Athens airport. It doesn’t answer air traffic controllers. The captain and co-pilot are missing but someone else is in the cockpit.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: The crew of Delta Airlines Flight 191 see rain and lightning up ahead, but fly on. Inside the storm, their plane is hit by powerful winds that slam the plane to the ground. 136 people die.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: An inexplicable failure strikes – the loss of two engines on a brand new passenger jet. Powerless at 30,000 ft, the pilot needs all his skill, and a little bit of luck, to get his plane to the airport

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: An explosion rips a hole in the cabin of a DC-10. Investigators recommend ways to fix the problem. Two years later, another DC-10 suffers the exact same problem, with deadly consequences.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: The cabin of a 747 Combi begins filling with smoke. Crew members attempt to fight a fire in the cargo hold. After the plane disappears in the Indian Ocean, a recovery operation is launched.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: A loud ‘thud’ emanates from the fuselage of British Airtours Flight #28, and the pilots abandon takeoff. Thick black smoke fills the cabin, and minutes later the aircraft is completely ravaged by fire

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Roaring down the runway at 170 miles an hour, Northwest Airlines Flight #255 barely manages to get off the ground before it hits a light pole, slams into a building, and disintegrates on a highway.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: After getting into position for a low-altitude fly-by at the Alsace air show, Airbus A-320 plows into a forest and is consumed by flames.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: US Air Flight #1493 get clearance just moments before landing, but within seconds of touching down, the aircraft erupts in flames and crashes into an abandoned brick building.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Hoping to save fuel, Korean Airlines Flight #007 requests permission to fly at a higher altitude. When the plane reaches its new altitude, it is rocked by rapid decompression, and crashes into the sea

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Air Ontario Flight #1363 prepares for takeoff after a brief layover. It reaches takeoff speed but struggles to get airborne, starts shaking violently, and crashes into the woods.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Air Inter Flight #148 starts its descent. Slightly off course, a controller guides the pilots, but as they descend the aircraft rips through the treetops below and slams into the side of a mountain.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Just as Chalk’s Ocean Airways Flight #101 is leveling off, it is suddenly rocked by an explosion and, plunges into the ocean. Eyewitness reports confirm one of its wings ripped off in mid-air.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Making a routine one-hour journey from Berlin, Crossair Flight #3597 is on its final approach to Zurich. But just minutes before landing the pilots cannot find the runway.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Approaching the end of its ten-hour journey from Beijing, British Airways Flight #38 gets hit with double engine failure.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: In France, the pressure is on for holiday home hosts from Kent. Can new bed & breakfast owners in Spain expand their business by adding yurts? And in the Cote d’Azur, there is chaos at an expats bar as her reservation system melts down.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: An ex-Londoner’s celebrity night in the bar in the south of France. A couple from Kent face bad news about their application for a glamping site in Spain, and in France, at one of the holiday homes, a couple finds a new and profitable market.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A couple try to turn round the fortunes of a failing campsite in France. Two hairdressers from Leicester hope to open a salon in the heart of Benidorm, and Margate bed & breakfast hosts take on an established guesthouse in the Andalusian Hills.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A flood threatens two hairdresser’s new salon in Benidorm. A British couple’s campsite is under the microscope when an inspector calls in France. And two Margate bed & breakfast hosts find out running a guesthouse in inland Spain isn’t that simple.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Two Brits struggle to keep up with the pace as tourists descend on their campsite in France. A couple of hairdressers take their salon to the next level. And novice market gardeners from Yorkshire sow the seeds of their new venture in France.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Disaster strikes for small holders in France. A couple from Oldham take on a bar renovation in Spain, but will they be ready before the summer season ends? And Brits running a campsite in France expand their glamping empire.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: French campsite owners find out if they have made enough to keep their dream alive. There’s teething problems for a couple running a bar in Spain, and a couple from Yorkshire temp French locals with their new Thai takeaway business.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Meet the young Brits trying to rent out their fantasy treehouse in France. In Spain, an Anglo-Dutch couple race to open their new bistro, and two pensioners from Cambridgeshire fight to save their French gite.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A couple in France welcome paying guests to their treehouse bed & breakfast for the first time. There is a grand opening for a new bistro in Spain, and ill health threatens to ruin one couple’s dream of running a gite in the Dordogne.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: In France, the inspectors descend on a Shropshire family’s treehouse. In Spain, a bistro gets a visit from a VIP, and will a Cambridgeshire couple in France ever open their gite?

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A Shropshire family are pushed to the limits trying to run three properties in France, a couple from Cambridge struggle juggling pets and guests, and we meet a couple from London stirring up the juice market on the Riviera.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Has a British-run juice business on the Riviera managed to survive? The owners of a new bistro make a tough decision in Spain, and a couple from Cambridgeshire plan their future in the Dordogne.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Two civil servants and their young son swap London for France. But how will they cope with a visiting nutria? An ex-policeman and his husband take over a failing hotel in Spain, and two ex-horticulture lecturers move to France.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: As the summer heats up in France, two plant nursery owners struggle with their water supply. Also in France, two gite owners tie the knot. In Spain, however, there’s high drama as after seven years of marriage two hotel owners go their separate ways.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: As the busiest time of the year approaches for a hotel owner in Spain—can he take the pressure? In France, bad weather threatens to ruin a big booking. And in France, two plant nursery owners launch their garden craft courses.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A couple of thrill-seeking motocross lovers move to Spain to open their own motocross-themed bed & breakfast. Two gite owners in France launch catered weekend, and a Liverpool mum lands in Spain with a dream to run her very own café bar.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: It’s crunch time for two plant nursery entrepreneurs in France as the season comes to an end. A couple running motocross holidays in Spain deals with their biggest booking, and a café owner on the Costa del Sol battles a flood.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A Devon couple take on more than they bargained for on an unloved hotel in France. Two sisters from Lincolnshire buy the diner they worked in as waitresses. And a couple from Kent hit the ground running when they buy a bed & breakfast.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Today, sisters bicker over plans for their steak restaurant in Spain. And a couple in France hit rock bottom when they realise their new bed & breakfast is a money pit.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A Spanish fiesta pushes sisters to their limit at their steak restaurant. Young parents juggle a childcare and a new paddleboarding business in Spain. And in France, a couple finally open their doors of their bed & breakfast after a year of renovations.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models embrace their inner warriors when they learn gladiator-style fighting, complete with swords.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The final four models step behind the camera during this week’s challenge when they get to photograph Paulina Porizkova and later pose as famous movie icons in a shoot with photographer Nigel Barker.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Cycle nine winner Saleisha Stowers stops by to cheer on the contestants during their Cover Girl commercial and print ad shoot.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: A hi-tech runway analyzes the girls’ strut & Tyra, Miss J and Jay Manuel assess which 14 show the most Top Model potential.
programme.sub-title: The Notorious Fierce Fourteen-Top Model Inauguration

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Benny Ninja is back to educate the girls about posing, but one of the girls takes contorting her body a little too far.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The ladies are excited when Tyra reveals it’s time for makeovers. Hair is cut and tears are shed when the girls see their new looks for the first time.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The ladies practice their strut down a catwalk while wearing blindfolds and one girl shocks the judges when she decides to lift her dress while posing.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The contestants are thrilled when Paulina shows up to show them how to model unflattering clothing with style.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Tyra surprises the remaining girls with a one-on-one photoshoot to teach each girl how to find their most flattering pose.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: A look at never-before-seen footage of the cycle 11 contestants that includes the ladies improvising a rap in the hot tub, one girl revealing a hidden talent and a very candid chat between Tyra and the model wannabes.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The ladies pull a disappearing act for this week’s challenge.
programme.sub-title: Now You See Me, Now You Don’t

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The ladies pack their bags and head overseas to their European destination.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The remaining five girls travel around town by boat for their go sees.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Paulina offers the girls advice on how to successfully model with a variety of items, including fish and toilet paper.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: In the cycle 11 finale, the three finalists put their Top Model experience to the test when they shoot their final CoverGirl commercial & print ad.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: A hi-tech runway analyzes the girls’ strut & Tyra, Miss J and Jay Manuel assess which 14 show the most Top Model potential.
programme.sub-title: The Notorious Fierce Fourteen-Top Model Inauguration

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Benny Ninja is back to educate the girls about posing, but one of the girls takes contorting her body a little too far.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The ladies are excited when Tyra reveals it’s time for makeovers. Hair is cut and tears are shed when the girls see their new looks for the first time.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The ladies practice their strut down a catwalk while wearing blindfolds and one girl shocks the judges when she decides to lift her dress while posing.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harrison Ford
programme.desc: Harrison reaches new heights in Air Force One - an aircraft so secretive it takes intel from a sitting US President to help make the film. Another movie threatens a titanic problem that may keep Air Force one from an on time departure.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: Bob Kane and Bill Finger’s costumed hero leaped off the page and onto the screen in 1966, but it wasn’t the dark detective fans anticipated.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: With an injured star, a troublesome vehicle, and an unyielding suit production is off to a rocky start. Can the producers and director work out their differences to land this dark superhero film? Or will disputes over the ending drop them all off a tower?
programme.sub-title: My Smile is Just Skin Deep

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: After the success of Batman 89, the studio was ready for round two, but their director was not. Given free reign, Burton and his handpicked team went wild. But would his dark vision scare away their target audience?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: A new director brings his own colorful aesthetic, but who is really in charge? A fraught production drives away his star yet delivers the toy friendly Batman the studio wanted. But when the sequel goes over the top, the franchise hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: To revive a dying franchise, the studio gives the keys to the Batmobile to an indie director whose origin story and grounded aesthetic promised to resuscitate their hero.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: On a mission to top his first outing, Nolan pushes his team harder than ever. But when tragedy strikes, no one is prepared.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: James Bond began with real life spy and anxious bridegroom, Ian Fleming. But it would take a bumpy road to bring this spy story to the screen. An unlikely team finds an unknown Scottish actor and faces down a troubled production to change cinema forever.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: Despite their wild success the cracks begin to show. With the departure of their star, Cubby Broccoli and Harry Saltzman must find a new actor to play the super-spy, adding tension to a strained relationship. How disastrous can their new choice be?
programme.sub-title: The Man Who Wouldn’t Be King

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: Though diamonds may be forever, Connery wasn’t. The producers need a new star and their choice revolutionizes the character. Embracing the cultural changes of the 70s takes Bond to new heights, but for one producer it would be the end of an era.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: With an aging actor in the lead and a new director in charge, the Battle of the Bonds divides the franchise before a new gritty take on the character nearly drives it to ruin. But it's the studio that threatens to deliver the finishing blow to Bond.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: With the troubles of the 80s behind them, is there a place for Bond in the modern world? With a new generation of producers in charge and the fate of the studio in their hands, can Pierce Brosnan defy expectations and revitalize the franchise?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: Producers make a risky bet and forgo the tried-and-true formula. Acquiring the long-estranged film rights to Fleming’s first novel, Casino Royale, they recast Bond with the least likely actor imagined and see if they can reinvent the spy one more time.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harry Potter
programme.desc: A director known for working with kids goes to great lengths to make children’s dreams come true, but the production hits a snag when taking flight proves more difficult than expected.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harry Potter
programme.desc: The team races to the finish line on the first film, while kicking off the second. But just as everything starts to come together, the team loses a family member.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harry Potter
programme.desc: A new director tests the team as he tries to bring real magic to Hogwarts, as well as a new Dumbledore. But will Harry Potter survive this new dark tone?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harry Potter
programme.desc: The Potter machine starts to go off the rails as the new director struggles to master the new technology. With the film still incomplete producers pull the plug and one crew member leaves the franchise for good.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harry Potter
programme.desc: As the franchise grows more adult, fame starts to take a toll on the stars. With the kids struggling to grow up and yet another new director at the helm, will Harry Potter lose the magic?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harry Potter
programme.desc: As the franchise comes down to its final test, making two movies for the price of one, an accident changes one crew member’s life forever

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Lisa has to decide help a competitor push further into the arctic unknown or go back to Polar headquarters with her teammates.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Reigning champ Polar Industries returns, and is looking to maintain its dominance by any means necessary; trucking rival Darrell Ward poaches an ice road legend out from the grips of Polar Industries.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Art Burke has to cross one of the longest winter roads in the world; Todd Dewey, must dig himself out of mountains of fresh snow or risk a dangerous night in freezing temperatures.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Todd goes on a risky run to deliver the heaviest haul in company history; Art's sent on a high stakes rescue mission; Lisa gets an exclusive contract; Darrell steals a load from Polar.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Polar boss Mark Kohaykewych mixes things up when he brings new soldier Mike Simmons into the winter roads battle; Todd Dewey and rival Darrell Ward both hit a newly opened trail.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Darrell Ward and Lisa Kelly work to make good on a power play for their young company but could lose it all when Darrell's truck breaks down; Polar driver Todd Dewey has to backtrack hundreds of miles to recover lost freight.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Art Burke attempts to keep his rig above ground on a melting ice crossing; polar driver Alex Debogorski battles his way up a mud covered mountain.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.desc: Lisa and Todd struggle to complete their daring joint venture across the frozen Hudson Bay; Darrell braves the most torn up trail remaining on the winter roads; Art must face the last open ice crossing.

programme.desc: Experts predict one of the shortest and warmest winters on record; as a result, companies risk financial ruin and communities face deprivation unless the drivers can deliver vital supplies before their window of opportunity slams shut.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars

programme.title: Biography: WWE Legends
programme.desc: A look at a more personal Ricky, from his humble beginnings as a military brat, unshakable family values, trials and triumphs, all culminating in the legendary bouts that sealed his place as an icon in sports-entertainment history.

programme.title: Biography: WWE Legends
programme.desc: Mark Henry just wanted to be someone special; once the victim of bullying and a few stints in juvenile detention, Mark's powerlifting helped turn his life around and made him an Olympian; Mark turned to his childhood passion: Sports Entertainment.

programme.desc: Diamond Dallas Page (DDP) and Molly Holly search for items from the legendary career of "Macho Man" Randy Savage; Randy's brother, Lanny Poffo, stops by the WWE warehouse to authenticate exclusive found footage of Macho's earliest matches.

programme.title: WWE's Most Wanted Treasures

programme.title: WWE's Most Wanted Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt to track down iconic items continues with Goldberg, who recounts his undefeated streak in WCW and his WWE debut with Booker T, Lita and Mick Foley; Goldberg and the team hit a major roadblock that derails the search.

programme.desc: Banner contracts for a cross-country trip in a car loaded with mob loot.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Headless Nun
programme.desc: When Sydney's plane crashes, she's asked by a group of nuns to find the head of another nun who was decapitated several centuries ago.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Smoking Gun
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel search for Al Capone's diamond-encrusted gun at the behest of a man hoping it will clear his grandfather of a murder he was framed for.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Affaire de Coeur
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to Scotland to find the second ring of the pair of Twining Rings of Calum and Elena.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Thank You Very Much
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to Germany to find a lost Elvis Presley guitar.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Transformation
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and Derek Lloyd go to the Peruvian jungle to look for the Paracelsus scrolls which contain the formula for turning lead into gold.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Flag Day
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Larivee, California to find the Pioneer's Bear Flag.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Emperor's Bride
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Moose Bay, Alaska looking for the white jade sarcophagus of a Chinese Empress. Sydney runs into fellow relic hunters Dallas Carter and Kurt Reiner.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and rival relic hunter Kurt Reiner attempt to find the lost baseball glove of Jimmy Jonesboro.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Nine Lives
programme.desc: Everyone who steals a statue that represents the Egyptian cat-goddess Mafdet is killed. Now, the statue has disappeared and Sidney and Nigel are tasked with retrieving it.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Book of Love
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Milan, Italy to search for Casanova's lost Book of Love.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Myth of the Maze
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and Claudia visit Athens, Greece to search the Minotaur's maze for the legendary golden twine.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Afterlife and Death
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Cairo, Egypt and then Amsterdam. They must beat rival relic hunter Avery Ko to the Pharaoh Thutmose's diamond before it is cut up and sold.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Etched in Stone
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and Stewie Harper head to Stockholm, Sweden to find the Runestone of King Jann I of Norway.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Irish Crown Affair
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Dublin, Ireland in search of the missing crown of the last King of Ireland.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Vanishing Art
programme.desc: Accompanying Max the magician, Sydney and Nigel journey to Atlantic City, New Jersey in search of Hungary's lost and allegedly cursed Royal Scepter.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Love Letter
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to France to look for the lost wedding vows of Josephine Pontoise and Guy de Bourdin, which would prove their heir is the rightful owner of St. Agnes Sur-Loire.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Good Year
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel travel to France to find the lost stones from Marie Antoinette's Crown.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Nothing But the Truth
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are reunited with Stewie Harper in the search for the Chalice of Truth in France.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to Paris, France after the Sword of Jacques de Molay, Grand Master of the Knights Templar. Rival relic hunter Rita Rosellini is also after the sword.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Dorchester Shire Hall P2
programme.desc: Under the main building of Dorchester Shire Hall there is a warren of tunnels and cells. Stuart enters this area that is said to house many a phantom.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: York Castle Museum
programme.desc: The history of York Castle Museum is almost endless as are the paranormal stories attached to it. Karl enters the street and cells with dramatic effect.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Shrewsbury Prison
programme.desc: Yvette takes Karl, Stuart and Mary into the vast Shrewsbury Prison. A place riddled with paranormal activity of every kind.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Hack Green Nuclear Bunker
programme.desc: Yvette and Glen: Built on ancient ground, Hack Green Nuclear Bunker is a hot spot for paranormal activity. Yvette and Glen go it alone and soon experience the bunkers reputation first-hand.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gloucester Prison P1
programme.desc: HMP Gloucester is a houses a huge selection of buildings, Karl investigates one block where spirits are said to make themselves known on a regular basis.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gloucester Prison P2
programme.desc: The education block of HMP Gloucester is an eerie set of corridors and empty rooms. Stuart enters for the first time and gradually realises that something is there with him.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Beaumanor Hall
programme.desc: Karl ventures, alone, to the upper floors of this large mansion and id stalked by something that wants to be heard.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Hack Green Bunker
programme.desc: Gregg enters the bunker for the first time and feels its energy. Has he caught the voice of the mysterious woman that some believe was murdered there?

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Eden Camp Museum
programme.desc: Once a prison camp during WWII, Eden Camp is now a museum housing many an artefact and many a ghost. Karl enters the cottage to face the spirits that are said to haunt this once family home.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Hickleton Hall
programme.desc: Once a grand mansion, this huge property is now very much passed it previous grandeur. Stuart investigates the long empty corridors alone and something seems to be following him.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Hack Green Nuclear Bunker
programme.desc: Karl and Stuart head to Hack Green Bunker and witness, first hand, the paranormal activity that regularly occurs there.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Charlton House
programme.desc: Karl investigates Carlton house library for the first time and quickly realises that he is not alone.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Bishton Hall
programme.desc: Yvette takes Glen and Mary into the incredibly haunted Bishton Hall. They start in the upper floors and work their way down to the cellars, but is something following them.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Margam Castle P1
programme.desc: Karl investigates the ground floor back rooms of this landmark castle alone, but soon realises that something is lurking in the shadows.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Margam Castle P2
programme.desc: The upper floors of Margam Castle are said to be haunted by many different spirits, Stuart goes it alone to try and find them.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Dorchester Prison 2 P1
programme.desc: Said to be the Most Haunted prison in the UK, HMP Dorchester is a scary place to be with a group of people but alone it becomes terrifying. Karl investigates the upper cells and gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Dorchester Prison 2 P2
programme.desc: Stuart enters the underbelly of this remarkable building and starts to witness some very strange occurrences.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Armely Mills Cottage
programme.desc: The cottage on the site of Armley Mills is said to be full of paranormal activity so Karl decides to enter, alone and witnesses something that is eager to grab his attention.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Shrewsbury Prison
programme.desc: Abandoned prisons are always a daunting prospect and the Most Haunted team love them. This time Karl takes on HMP Shrewsbury alone and experiences some of the unhappy phantoms that lurk in the shadows.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Samlesbury Hall P1
programme.desc: With a history dating back to 1185, Salmesbury Hall is of the UK’s most historic buildings and said to be one of the most haunted. With ghost stories and sightings all over the building, Stuart investigates the ground floor.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Samlesbury Hall P2
programme.desc: Karl investigates the upper floors of this historic building dating back to 1185, and realises he is not alone.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gressenhall Workhouse Pt1
programme.desc: Karl investigates the very haunted school room in the large imposing Gressenhall Workhouse. The activity starts even before Karl gets into the building and becomes one of the most impressive investigations to date.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gressenhall Workhouse Pt2
programme.desc: Stuart investigates two buildings, a forge and the cottage. He could not have imagined the activity that unfolded around him.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Bishton Hall P1
programme.desc: Stuart investigates the main house and seems to be pulled in different directions from an unexplained energy.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Bishton Hall P2
programme.desc: Karl ventures down into the cellars of this large country house and soon comes under attack from an unseen force.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Karl enters a Masonic Temple alone, seeking the truth behind its eerie reputation. The mysterious world of Freemasonry soon reveals a chilling presence in the shadows.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Cameras are left locked-off in haunted sites across the country, capturing chilling activity in a bold experiment with some truly remarkable results.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Monkey hunts bandits for Lord Li, but discovers they’re not what they seem. Meanwhile, at an inn owned by a wicked dog-woman, Tripitaka faces a dangerous surprise.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Tripitaka dreams of a slain king whose throne was stolen by a Taoist imposter. With the prince’s help, the pilgrims set out to reveal the false king and restore the rightful ruler.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: A wall divides the lands of night and day. The Queen of Night feasts on blood, the King of Day enslaves all. Reuniting them is hard when Monkey and Pigsy are both distracted by women.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Codslow suffers under three immortal tyrants. The pilgrims aid a family against the rulers who draw power from pearls, paper, and wine. Pigsy nearly roasts before Monkey devises a plan to free the land.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Pigsy searches for a missing girl, finding she’s married to a slug monster. Disguised as the slug, he lives with vain Hai-Min—until she notices her husband isn’t so slimy after all.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In a volcanic land plagued by quakes, a catfish demon and a faceless shape-changer fight. A priest claims one pilgrim is the impostor. Distrust splits the group apart.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The pilgrims meet a man digging a mountain tunnel for 22 years. Tripitaka insists they help, but Monkey’s magic shortcut angers him. Banished Monkey leaves them vulnerable to grave danger.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The King of Unicorns seeks Monkey’s magic staff as a gift. Using a magic ring, he captures Tripitaka and weakens Monkey. Pigsy, tempted by Chun-Shou, must resist to save his master.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The Grey Gloves Devil kills villages with hypnotic eyes. While Pigsy lags, a woman mistakes Tripitaka for her lost son. Captured, Pigsy must escape before the Devil strikes again.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Chen-Gold, the richest man alive, seeks a husband for his daughter while greed consumes him. Obsessed with wealth, he turns himself to gold.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Yung-Hu, a lovesick goblin, falls for a married woman, I-Ling. The pilgrims teach them about love, faith, and the path toward enlightenment.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: As the pilgrims sleep, the Illiterate Vampire tries to bite Tripitaka. When discovered, he’s chased away—learning that even ignorance can be redeemed.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: A kind monster disguises himself as a puppy to win friends, but villagers fear him. The pilgrims teach him that goodness doesn’t need disguise.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The group meets four sorcerers impersonating them. Monkey and his friends expose the fakes, proving that virtue and truth cannot be copied.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The pilgrims visit a village where a sacred screen depicts Goddess Sorosvati and the Gods of Fortune. Magic within the painting traps their souls.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In a land ruled by a wasp witch who kidnaps children, the pilgrims fight to restore families and break the witch’s curse of sorrow.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: On Mt. Sekigutsu, the demon Seisai turns all things to stone. A brave girl defies him, and the pilgrims aid her in freeing the mountain’s beauty.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Shosanpu, a young demon rejected by his parents, practices magic on the pilgrims. His mistakes teach him humility and the meaning of real power.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Lost in the wild, the pilgrims stumble upon Mt. Blue Wolf, home to feral wolf demons. They must survive and uncover the truth behind their arrogance.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: A hungry boy tries to steal food from the pilgrims. Monkey sees himself in the child’s mischief and learns compassion through forgiveness.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Ross Kemp
programme.desc: A courageous man who's living proof you can reinvent yourself more times than a Love Island contestant. He went from pulling pints in the Queen Vic to pulling BAFTAs for documentaries…

programme.title: Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Lucy Bronze
programme.desc: Tonight’s guest has lived that journey. From a football-loving kid to one of the world’s finest players, she’s lifted major trophies, captained teams, and become a role model for millions. Lucy Bronze welcome on the Yellow Couch.
programme.sub-title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Lucy Bronze

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Charlotte Crosby
programme.desc: She first burst onto our screens on Geordie Shore—back when her biggest commitment was to Jägerbombs and fake tan. Since then she’s gone from wild nights in Newcastle towinning Celebrity Big Brother.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Patrice Evra
programme.desc: Today, we’ve got a guest who has lived several lives in one. On the pitch, he was a fierce left-back who collected trophies like kids collect Pokémon cards. Off the pitch, he’s become the man of Monday mornings.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Ben Whittaker
programme.desc: A guest who has a huge drive and work ethics and has overcome some hurdles that have possibly made him stronger. His entrances make Harry Styles look underdressed at Coachella.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Kaya Scodelario
programme.desc: She became a household name at just 14years old, when she burst onto our screens in the groundbreaking series Skins. Since then, she’s pursued her acting dreams all the way to Hollywood — and built quite an impressive career.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A witness flying from Hawaii to the mainland is marked for death to prevent his testimony against a gangster.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A rabbi's (David Opatoshu) 13-year-old grandson joins a group of black teens to search for an ancient, stolen Torah.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A member (David Cassidy) of Mark's neighborhood basketball team is trapped in a mob boss's robbery ring.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A produce merchant (Ann Doran) refuses to sell her business to a mob-backed combine.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Mark's kindness to a hitchhiker (Tina Louise) gets him involved with three gunmen who robbed a poker club.
programme.sub-title: Beware the Wiles of the Stranger

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A Samoan boxer (Patrick Adiarte) suffers physical and emotional abuse at the hands of his relatives when he decides to quit the ring.
programme.sub-title: Eden Is the Place We Leave

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside's probe of a friend's (Alan Napier) disappearance in Fiji uncovers extortion and espionage; guest Bernard Fox.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Eve and a friend are kidnap victims with a huge ransom demanded from the friend's banker-husband. Guest star: John Saxon.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Alone and without a telephone or electricity, Ironside must battle a vengeful murderer (Robert Lipton).

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: To protect a convict-rehabilitation program, Ironside must exonerate a reformed burglar charged with jewel theft.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: After his wife is murdered, a convicted thief (William Shatner) is paroled in Ironside's custody to care for his son.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A socialite (Marsha Hunt) pressures the commissioner to solve a series of high-society dog snatchings.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Brown opposes parole for the psychotic murderer (Bill Bixby) who also caused the accidental death of his fiancée.
programme.sub-title: Tom Dayton Is Loose Among Us

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: An anonymous caller planning murder teases Ironside with clues; guests Dane Clark, Virginia Gregg, Barry Brown.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside suspects a government witness's killer belongs to an anti-war organization helping draft evaders; guest Martin Sheen.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A blizzard traps Ironside in a remote cabin with an addict friend (Joseph Campanella) who has run out of drugs.
programme.sub-title: The Happy Dreams of Hollow Men

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A murder attempt on Mark's law professor (James Daly) coincides with the class's re-creation of a murder trial; guest Tyne Daly.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A bitter man (Richard Basehart) seeks revenge on the hippie pals who bilked him; guest Tim Considine.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: In April 2015, 24-year-old student Karen Buckley went missing while on a night out in Glasgow. Emilia visits the location where Karen was last seen, the Sanctuary nightclub, and learns about the investigation that tried to find her.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Emilia visits Peterborough, where a young woman, Sally Ann McGrath, went missing in 1979, having last been seen in the city centre. It took nearly eight months for her body to be found, after police assumed she had simply run away.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: The quiet seaside town of Mablethorpe was an unlikely location for what appeared to be an organised hit on a couple in their 50s. Emilia travels to the Lincolnshire coast to learn about the violent murders of Joan and John Stirland in 2004.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Jordan Monaghan comes under suspicion when his girlfriend is found dead. After all, he is already linked to two other suspicious deaths. Is he a serial killer?

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Emilia uncovers details surrounding the brutal murder of Rosie Darbyshire. Witnesses and CCTV were key to solving the case which shocked the local communit

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Chatham: Emilia uncovers details surrounding Joshua Stimpson's murder of ex-girlfriend Molly McLaren, a case which shook the victim's family and community to its core

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Emilia examines three murders which shook Beenham in the 1960s. One of the murders went unsolved for 40 years, until detectives vowed to finally seek justice.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Emilia looks into the killing of Martin Decker, who had been bludgeoned with a hammer. Police would link the murder to a suspect dubbed the NR3 cat killer.

programme.title: Murdertown: Hull
programme.desc: When a young woman goes missing on Valentine’s Day, detectives turn to a pollen expert, who pieces together fragments of evidence to find her body.

programme.title: Murdertown: Dartford
programme.desc: In 1993, 16-year-old Claire Tiltman is found dying by the roadside. Her killer disappears into the night. More than 20 years later, Colin Ash Smith is finally brought to trial. Jurors hear of how he knew Claire, and even went to her funeral.

programme.title: Murdertown: Dundee
programme.desc: Aged 15, Robbie McIntosh walked into a fish and chip shop to announce that a woman had been killed on the iconic Law Hill. Police revealed the victim had been stabbed dozens of times. But they never imagined that the culprit was the teenager.

programme.title: Murdertown: Barnsley
programme.desc: In 2015, a 69-year-old man is found stabbed in his home. At the scene, forensics uncover a receipt from a nearby cashpoint. CCTV at the bank reveals a woman using the victim's card to withdraw cash. Who is she? And how does she relate to the murder?

programme.title: Murdertown: Pontypridd
programme.desc: In 2014, a woman goes missing after a night drinking in the local pubs. CCTV finds her walking home arm in arm with another drinker. He just happens to be a former butcher. Police soon realise he has put his trade to use by dismembering his victim.

programme.title: Murdertown: Tamworth
programme.desc: In 1994, a gang kill a woman who manages a building society and tie up her husband, before robbing the building society of large sums of cash. But despite making a tearful plea for help, the injured husband’s story doesn’t tally.

programme.title: Murdertown: Watford
programme.desc: In 2000, a young woman is stabbed to death while walking her dog in a picturesque park in the town. A suspect is seen running semi-naked across the M1 motorway. It takes detectives weeks to identify the killer as a local man called Leon Amos.

programme.title: Murdertown: Huddersfield
programme.desc: In 2014 a sex offender called Robert Hind goes missing from a bail hostel. Cops fear he’s absconded to commit crime. The town is scoured. But then the cops learn that the sex offender hasn’t absconded - he’s been murdered.

programme.title: Murdertown: Sunderland
programme.desc: Throughout the early '90s young boys would be found dead after sniffing glue and being trapped in derelict buildings which caught fire. Cops soon found they were actually being systematically murdered by a man called Steven Grieveson.

programme.title: Murdertown: Brighton
programme.desc: In 2015 a man visits a tarot card reader. Within an hour she’s dealt out the death card and he’s confessed to a murder. When cops arrive they discover he’s been living at home with his victim’s body for days.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Portsmouth: Ten-part true crime series with Katherine Kelly examining the UK's most shocking murders and the impact they've left on local communities. First up: Portsmouth.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Wrexham: Katherine Kelly explores how Jordan Davidson left an entire community in fear, when his series of increasingly violent crimes culminated in murder.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Ricardo Godinho
programme.desc: Aliny and Ricardo Godinho had four children and a relationship history that spanned 17 years. While Aliny put her kids at the centre of everything she did, for Ricardo they were a morbid obsession, and one that would lead to a shocking, brutal crime.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Ramanodge Unmathallegadoo
programme.desc: At the age of 16, Sana Muhammad had an arranged marriage to Ramanodge Unmathallegadoo, a man almost twice her age. She managed to escape the unhappy relationship and found new love, but Ramanodge decided she would never get to enjoy her new life.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Frances Hall
programme.desc: When Frances Araiza met Bill Hall Jr, he was a 16 year old with big ideas. Fast forward three decades and they were grandparents with a multi-million dollar empire. But behind closed doors, their marriage story was heading for an explosive finale.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Faria Khan
programme.desc: After leaving an arranged marriage she claimed was abusive, Faria Khan could have moved on. But she wouldn’t be satisfied until estranged husband Nawajid was dead. And she knew exactly who to ask to help her.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Steven McDowell
programme.desc: Steven and Crystal McDowell were never a good match, and for years after they split, Steven deluded himself that reconciliation was just around the corner. Then, Crystal disappeared during a deadly hurricane. Was she the victim of a natural disaster?

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Glyn Dix
programme.desc: Glyn Dix met Hazel while he was serving a life term for a brutal rape and murder. After convincing her he had been framed, the couple fell for one another. But five years after his release from prison, Glyn finally showed Hazel his true colours.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Colleagues and customers at the pharmacy owned by Jessica and Mitesh Patel recall how abusive, controlling and sometimes violent Mitesh was towards his wife. But they had no idea that he was hatching a plan to brutally end the marriage.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Carole and Harry Jarvis were married for over 30 years. But he met a new woman, heiress Rita Heyster, and decided it was time to move on. In a bizarre, twisted scheme, Harry and Rita plotted to murder Carole and cover up her death.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: William Walker was a firefighter and paramedic with a reputation for helping strangers. Little wonder that debt-ridden Uloma Curry was attracted to him. Within weeks of their wedding she was plotting to get her hands on his cash.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Micah Rine's family had a bad feeling about Thomas Pate. He seemed inauthentic. He had a troubled past. But nothing could persuade Micah that he wasn't the man of her dreams. By the time Micah realised Thomas had a dark side, it was too late.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Rod Covlin met Shele Danishevsky at a Jewish singles night. She was older, successful and rich, and Rod was happy to live off his wife. After her mysterious death, it seemed he would stop at nothing to get his hands on her money.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: From the moment she set eyes on co-worker Charlie Stephens, Kirstin was determined to have him; never mind his 40-year marriage. She seduced him, and in doing so set her husband on the path of financial ruin, deception, and ultimately murder.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: When Faye and Marian Caliman first met, she was bowled over by his gentlemanly ways. He was the life and soul of family parties. But when the marriage turned sour, Faye and her family realised Marian was not the true gent he’d always pretended.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Andrew and Janee Parsons’ marriage broke down when she fell for someone new. Still living in the family home, Janee hadn’t reckoned on Andrew’s jealousy and violence - just as he hadn’t realised his horrific actions would all be caught on tape.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Scott Gellatly swept neighbour Lori Jackson off her feet. But her mother Merry had doubts about Scott. He controlled where Lori went, and who she spoke to. So when things turned violent, it wasn’t just Lori in the firing line.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Rhys Hancock was a respected school head; his wife Helen a much-loved PE teacher. When their marriage failed she found love with Martin Griffiths. But Rhys made the choice that ending his wife’s happiness would be worth the long prison sentence.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Heather and Mark Arthur had been married 30 years. But their marriage wasn’t always a happy one: Mark was controlling and jealous, and eventually Heather decided she wanted out. When she confessed to finding new love, Mark’s jealousy boiled over.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Bill Taylor loved wife Angela, even when she left him, even when she met new partner, Paul Cannon. But Angela hated Bill, because he refused to divorce her. The answer, in Angela and Paul’s minds, was to end the marriage by any means necessary.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Greg Williams was Michelle’s knight in shining armour. A mother of three, working in the sex industry, Greg was her ticket to a luxurious life. When an intruder breached their mansion’s security and attacked the couple, detectives were baffled.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Maria Sanutti-Spencer revelled in her dad Rocco’s criminal past, and threatened violent retribution for anyone who crossed her. As her marriage broke down, her husband, Frank, saw first-hand what Maria and her father were capable of.

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 061
programme.desc: Murder of Richard Carno – Found strangled in his car, Richard was killed by his wife’s brother for insurance. Both he and the wife were convicted, and she was also convicted of molesting her stepson. Both got life sentences.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 061

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 026
programme.desc: Murder of Cori Desmond – After Valentine’s Day in Redondo Beach, Cori vanished. Her remains were found in the San Bernardino Mountains. A tip about her boyfriend Tony Perez’s strange behavior led police to the killer.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 026

programme.title: Judgment With Ashleigh Banfield: Judgment of Scott Nelson
programme.desc: Jennifer Fulford was a middle-aged nanny excited to travel to Dallas to meet her grandchild for the first time. But when ex-con Scott Nelson looked at her, he saw a target for his rage.

programme.title: Judgment With Ashleigh Banfield: Judgment of The Hit-And-Run Murder
programme.desc: While under the influence of drugs and alcohol, Chante Mallard struck pedestrian Gregory Biggs with her car, impaling him in the windshield.

programme.desc: Protestor Runs on NBA Court/Ripped Receipt Gets Owners Vehicle Towed Twice
